title: viola purpurea var. geophyta
intro: Viola purpurea var. geophyta, also known as the winter violet or purple violet, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the violet family. The roots and leaves of Viola purpurea var. geophyta have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. The herbal preparations of Viola purpurea var. geophyta include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
